svg.text: ~/.config/quickshell/quoil · entry: shell.qml · QML module URI "qs" = repo root, "Quoil.*" = C++ plugin
settings.watchFiles · loads everything below in order
one window per screen, background layer
clock · media · weather · resources · notif dock
Drawers — modules/drawers/ · ONE full-screen layer-shell window per screen (ContentWindow.qml)
SDF blob border (Quoil.Blobs) · Regions.qml input mask · Interactions.qml edge hover/drag · HyprlandFocusGrab · Exclusions.qml reserves space
Each panel = Wrapper.qml (reveal anim, collapses to 0) + Content.qml (lazy-loaded UI).
Shown when its bool in DrawerVisibilities flips — set by Shortcuts/IPC/edge-hover.
Window mask (Regions.qml) = bar + open panels → click-through elsewhere.
DrawerVisibilities (components/DrawerVisibilities.qml) per screen → registered in the Visibilities singleton, keyed by Hyprland monitor
WindowFactory.create() on "nexus" keybind / ipc · destroyed on close
NavPane + Pages: wallpaper & style · network · bluetooth · audio
Shared UI kit (used by everything above)
utils/ — Paths · Icons · Images · Searcher (fzf.js) · Strings · SysInfo
Root helper scopes — headless, always loaded (modules/*.qml)
C++ plugin — plugin/src/Caelestia/ → QML modules "Quoil.*" (CMake, run-quoil.sh)
Service singletons — services/*.qml (lazy, shared state for all modules)
walls dir · sets via caelestia CLI
+ utils/: Paths (XDG dirs, still …/caelestia) · SysInfo · Icons · Searcher (fuzzy)
caelestia CLI (scheme / wallpaper — see caveat in docs)
Hyprland config (outside this repo) drives the shell via:
· exec → IPC targets drawers · picker · lock · nexus · toaster
